description: Baseline measurement of mixed workload throughput
Optimized hashing with FxBuildHasher and removed unnecessary Arc clone in StorageEngine::set

asi.change_1: Switched DashMap hasher from SipHash to FxHash for faster key hashing
asi.change_2: Removed unnecessary Arc::clone in occupied entry branch of StorageEngine::set

description: Refactored Client::get to use direct DashMap access, avoiding unnecessary Arc clone

asi.change: Client::get now uses self.storage.data.get() directly and holds the Ref only as needed, dropping before remove
asi.rationale: Avoided extra Arc clone and atomic operations in the hot get path
